content.text: {"component":"tagging","summary":"Tagging presents as a governed, canonical tagging runtime with clear contracts, strong config governance, and runnable host-minimal surface; it reads as a strong pre-RC internal component pending CI integration hardening and documentation path alignment.","strengths":["Canonical HTTP contract present (contracts/http)","Runnable host-minimal runtime and Docker assets","Rich governance configs (security, RBAC, quota, policy, observability)","Docs and Antora project config present","QA toolchain declared (PHPUnit, PHPStan, PHP CS Fixer, Panther, Playwright)"],"risks":["Repository docs/report path may not match registry path (.antora-src not present here)","No git tag found in this snapshot, suggesting pre-release state","Test suite depth and CI execution not verified in this run","Operational observability hooks not validated beyond config presence"],"next_actions":["Align component report path with repository docs (docs/ vs .antora-src) and wire scheduled assessment runner","Ensure GitHub Actions execute audits and test suites (composer audit:ci, phpunit, phpstan)","Cut a tagged release and keep CHANGELOG/RELEASE_NOTES current","Confirm observability wiring in runtime (enable metrics/logging/traces per tag_observability.yaml)","Keep HTTP contract under contracts/http in sync with docs/api and publish via docs:openapi:publish in CI"],"notes":["Default branch: master","Commit: b6c6a0bd2092f91f52607cfab85bae05ba326e9d","Repo includes admin UI artifacts and host-minimal runtime for local smoke flows"],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["composer.json","package.json","docker-compose.yml","host-minimal/index.php","host-minimal/smoke-health.php","host/Dockerfile","contracts/http","config/tag_runtime.php","config/tag_security.yaml","config/tag_rbac.yaml","config/tag_quota.yaml","config/tag_policy.yaml","config/tag_observability.yaml",".github/workflows","docs/antora.yml","docs/api","docs/ops","README.md","RELEASE_NOTES.md","CHANGELOG.md","MANIFEST.json","admin/index.html"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":null,"market":null,"overall":null},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity is clearly expressed as a canonical tagging component with documented scope (CRUD, assignment, search/suggest, surfaces) and owner-facing docs, suitable for internal ecosystem reuse.","risks":["Documentation/report path may be misaligned with registry reference (.antora-src vs docs/)."],"improvements":["Align report location with registry path and keep README/RELEASE_NOTES updated for each release."],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","docs/antora.yml","RELEASE_NOTES.md","CHANGELOG.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Architecture reads coherent for a tagging runtime: host-minimal entry points, explicit HTTP contracts, and structured domain/config boundaries for routes, RBAC, policy, and runtime.","risks":["Broad configuration surface (many tag_* configs) requires sustained boundary governance to avoid coupling and drift."],"improvements":["Keep contracts/http and route catalogs authoritative and reflect any boundary changes in docs/architecture."],"evidence":["contracts/http","host-minimal/bootstrap.php","config/tag_public_route_paths.php","config/tag_route_catalog.php","host/Dockerfile"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runnable surface is present via host-minimal, Docker compose, and dedicated runtime configs; admin assets indicate a minimal operator/UI surface for local flows.","risks":["No exact git tag detected in this snapshot, implying pre-release state."],"improvements":["Exercise smoke and local server flows in CI and document runtime knobs in config/tag_runtime.php."],"evidence":["docker-compose.yml","host-minimal/index.php","host-minimal/smoke-health.php","config/tag_runtime.php","admin/index.html"]},"qa":{"summary":"QA toolchain is declared (PHPUnit, PHPStan, PHP CS Fixer, Panther, Playwright) with .dist configs and GitHub Actions folder, indicating readiness for multi-band testing.","risks":["Actual test suite execution and coverage are not verified in this run; phpunit/phpstan configs are .dist-based."],"improvements":["Ensure CI runs phpunit and phpstan with the provided .dist configs and add Playwright e2e runs where applicable."],"evidence":["composer.json","phpstan.neon.dist","phpunit.xml.dist",".github/workflows","package.json"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational posture is strong on paper: Docker assets, alerts, and configs for security, RBAC, quota, policy, and observability are present alongside deployment docs.","risks":["Observability and alerting integrations are not validated beyond config presence."],"improvements":["Wire observability/alerts in deployment targets and validate signals during smoke and canary runs."],"evidence":["deploy/docker","ops/alerts","config/tag_security.yaml","config/tag_rbac.yaml","config/tag_observability.yaml","docs/ops"]},"market":{"summary":"Market-facing alignment is supported by clear identity, public docs, and change notes; the component remains positioned as an internal governed capability.","risks":["Proprietary license may limit external adoption if external distribution is desired."],"improvements":["Clarify external vs internal consumption posture in README and keep API docs under docs/api current."],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","docs/api","RELEASE_NOTES.md","CHANGELOG.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"Overall, Tagging demonstrates a mature internal component trending to RC with governed contracts, runnable surface, and QA/ops scaffolding; remaining gaps are CI wiring, release tagging, and docs path alignment.","risks":["Registry report path may not match repository structure; no release tag detected."],"improvements":["Connect scheduled assessment runner, align docs/report path, and tag a release once CI runs audits and tests."],"evidence":[".github/workflows","docs/antora.yml","MANIFEST.json","CHANGELOG.md","RELEASE_NOTES.md"]}}}
